name: aicoding-agent-dev-kit
description: Spec Pack, SDD, TDD, sequential context loading, lightweight decision memory, and quality-gate workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Spec/TDD workflow with sequential context loading.
interface.longDescription: A repo-safe Codex plugin that provides thin skills, optional lifecycle hooks, custom agents, and scripts for Spec Pack, TDD, decision memory, context loading, and quality gates.
defaultPrompt: Use AiCoding Agent Dev Kit to load the minimum project context and plan the next TDD task.
Use AiCoding Agent Dev Kit to verify this change with the quality gate.
